abilities.name: Oath Of Supremacy
abilities.flavor: By the will of the gods, this warrior leads her barbarous horde into the lands of the enemy, allowing none to oppose them.
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of your general to be the target.
abilities.effect: Until the start of your next turn, add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made by the target.

abilities.name: Swift Attackers
abilities.flavor: As they close in on the enemy at frightening speed, these skilled horsemen are nigh impossible to hit with missile fire.
abilities.effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for shooting attacks that target this unit.

abilities.name: Visions Of Glory
abilities.flavor: Godspeakers use their powers of divination to scry the future and see what glory awaits their kin.
abilities.effect: If this unit includes a Godspeaker, roll 8 dice. For each 4+, until the start of your next turn, you can re-roll 1 hit roll , 1 wound roll , 1 run roll or 1 save roll for this unit.

abilities.name: Glorious Death
abilities.flavor: Ever keen to earn the favour of their tribe, when the eyes of the fiercest fighters are upon them, these warriors will not go down without a fight.
abilities.effect: Each time a model in this unit is slain by a combat attack and that model was in combat with the attacking model, roll a dice. On a 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the FIGHT ability has been resolved.
